message:
Reject new stream opens after sending GOAWAY

- connection.rs: Extend open_stream() check to include goaway_sent flag,
  preventing client from opening streams after initiating graceful shutdown;
  add test verifying GOAWAY-sent state rejects new streams with ProtocolError

This aligns with HTTP/2 spec: once GOAWAY is sent, no new streams should
be created on the connection in either direction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
